Kothanur, Bangalore · Since day one, 24/7

A dignified farewell, arranged with care.

When a loved one passes, you shouldn’t have to worry about arrangements. St. Paul’s handles everything — ambulance, mortuary, coffin, church and crematorium — with compassion and at a budget-friendly cost.

What we take care of

Every service, under one roof

From the first phone call to the final farewell — one team, one number, everything arranged.

Most requested

24/7 Ambulance Service

Rapid-response ambulances across Bangalore and out-of-state — body pickup and transport with a calm, professional crew, at any hour.

Learn more

Freezer Box on Rent

Hygienic preservation at home or hospital — delivered and installed within hours, anywhere in Bangalore.

Learn more

Hearse Van Services

Dignified, air-conditioned hearse vans for safe and respectful final journeys.

Learn more

Coffin Boxes

Premium wooden and standard coffins, prepared with cross, lining and floral dressing.

Learn more

Embalming & Mortuary

Professional embalming, dressing and complete mortuary arrangements, handled with reverence.

Learn more

International Repatriation

Complete domestic and international repatriation — documentation, embassy clearances and airline coordination.

Learn more
Our fleet & facilities

Real vehicles, genuine care

Every ambulance, hearse, freezer box and coffin you see here is ours — maintained with respect and ready around the clock.

“Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his faithful servants.”

Psalm 116:15
In your hardest hour

You make one call.
We carry the rest.

01

Call us, any hour

One phone call is all it takes. We answer immediately — at midnight or midday — and listen to what your family needs.

02

We reach you quickly

Our ambulance or hearse van arrives promptly anywhere in Bangalore, with a calm, respectful team.

03

Everything arranged

Freezer box, embalming, coffin, flowers, church and crematorium booking, paperwork — we carry it all, so you don’t have to.

04

A dignified farewell

Your loved one is honoured with the care, reverence and dignity they deserve, from first call to final rest.

Where we serve

Rooted in Kothanur, serving every family

Our hub near Lulu Supermarket lets us reach the surrounding neighbourhoods in 15–20 minutes — and our vans travel across Karnataka and beyond.

Guidance

Questions families often ask

What areas in Bangalore do you serve?

We provide comprehensive funeral and ambulance services across all areas of Bangalore, as well as out-of-state ambulance services. Our main hub is located near Lulu Supermarket, Kothanur.

Do you offer 24/7 ambulance services?

Yes, our ambulance service is available 24/7. We guarantee prompt body pickup and transportation with fully equipped vehicles.

What is included in the mortuary arrangement?

Our mortuary arrangements include freezer box rentals, professional embalming, dressing, and complete preservation services to ensure the utmost dignity for your loved ones.

Can you help with crematorium or burial bookings?

Absolutely. We assist families in booking crematoriums, arranging church services, and organizing all necessary paperwork for a smooth process.

One call, and everything is taken care of.

Speak to us any time — we respond immediately, day or night.

77609 11567 Get directions

Day or night, we answer

We are here when you need us.

You are not alone

If you have just lost someone, we are here.

Take your time. When you are ready, one call is all it takes — we will explain what happens next and quietly take care of every arrangement, at any hour.
